themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles discussing AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, make decisions, and interact with tools or environments.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content focused on AI tools that assist developers in writing, debugging, reviewing, or generating code.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Discussion and reviews of specific AI-powered tools designed to aid in various research processes, from data analysis to literature reviews.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Articles exploring how AI is affecting jobs, skills, and employment landscapes, including research on potential job displacement and evolution.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Content related to AI's ability to analyze user sentiment, reviews, and feedback to derive insights.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Focuses on AI's capabilities in condensing large amounts of text, such as meeting notes, transcripts, or research papers, into concise summaries.

themes.name: AI testing automation
themes.description: Articles discussing AI's role in automating testing processes, including software testing, product testing, and quality assurance.

themes.name: AI usability testing
themes.description: Content related to using AI to streamline or enhance the process of usability testing for products and interfaces.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Focuses on how AI is being applied to assist product managers with tasks like strategy, research, and decision-making.

themes.name: Synthetic users
themes.description: Articles exploring the use and detection of AI-generated or synthetic personas and voices in research and user interaction contexts.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
